title: Digital-twin auto-validator (operator stand-in for proposed actions)

phases.title: STDB action queue
tasks: proposed_action table (id auto, kind, payload_json, proposed_by, related_commitment_id, status, twin_verdict, twin_rationale, escalate_reason, proposed_at, decided_at, executed_at)
executed_action append-only audit table
Reducers: proposed_action_open, proposed_action_twin_decide, proposed_action_mark_executed, proposed_action_mark_failed, proposed_action_operator_override
twin_review_schedule scheduled reducer (30s) — placeholder; nexus-side consumer drives the work

phases.title: Drafter — commitment to file_write payload
tasks: orchestration::drafter tokio task polls commitment WHERE artifact_kind='verifiable_path' AND status='open' AND no proposed_action exists yet
Inference proposer with prompt 'You committed to <action> with success=<artifact>. Produce the actual content of <artifact> now.'
Write proposed_action(kind='file_write', payload={path,content}, proposed_by=role, related_commitment_id=id)
Cap content size 50 KB; truncate + warn if exceeded

phases.title: Digital-twin reviewer
tasks: orchestration::twin_reviewer tokio task polls proposed_action WHERE status='pending'
Loads operator memory dir verbatim (~/.claude/projects/.../memory/*.md, capped 32 KB)
Loads last 10 commitment satisfy/abandon decisions
Builds JSON-mode inference call (frontier model when available, else Tier 2.5)
Parses {verdict, rationale, escalate_reason?} into proposed_action_twin_decide reducer
On escalate: posts inbox notification priority=2 + leaves status=escalated
Drift detector: if operator overrides twin >25% in 1h sliding window, pause twin via env-mediated kill switch

phases.title: Action executor (file_write sink)
tasks: orchestration::action_executor::file_write polls proposed_action WHERE status='approved'
Hard deny-list: trunk Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, /etc/, /root/, anything outside repo, anything matching active hijacker damage list
Use existing SafeFileWriter (composition-root path)
On success: proposed_action_mark_executed + commitment_satisfy(evidence=path)
On failure: proposed_action_mark_failed with reason

phases.title: REST + Actions dashboard view
tasks: GET /api/actions?status=pending|approved|escalated|executed|all
POST /api/actions/override {id, verdict, reason}  (operator manual override)
POST /api/actions/execute {id}  (operator force-execute escalated)
#/actions Solid view: action card with twin verdict, rationale, content preview, override buttons

phases.title: Build + deploy + smoke
tasks: scripts/build-wasm.sh hexflo-coordination
cargo build -p hex-nexus --release
Deploy + restart
Re-send the persona-tooling-gap.md board ask
Verify: commitments(5) → drafter produces 5 proposed_actions within 60s → twin verdicts within 90s → at least one approved → file written → commitment satisfied
